code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let input = "#{line} "
let n = string.len(input)

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur: String = ""
mut running_max: Int = 0
mut has_any: Bool = false

mut i: Int = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      let parsed = string.parse_int(cur)
      let v = match parsed
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if not has_any
        running_max = v
        has_any = true
      else if v > running_max
        running_max = v
      end
      maxes = list.push(maxes, running_max)
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut out: String = ""
mut j: Int = 0
let m = list.len(maxes)
while j < m
  let v_opt = list.get(maxes, j)
  let v = match v_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
